reason: Quality bar for Go code: normalization, mutex usage, no blocking I/O in locks
Verify stable public method contracts are not broken by ClipSettings field additions
Config save / load error handling conventions
Frontend code quality bar: types in shared/, no hand-edit of wailsjs/auto-imports/components.d.ts
Verify only zh-CN.json is modified, en-US.json untouched
Verify ClipSettings struct shape stays consistent across Go config / Go app / TS shared types
Verify the new options follow existing patterns (e.g. EnableSpecShowXray migration pattern) instead of inventing parallel mechanisms
